name: Mighty and Crafty Side Kit
summary: This comprehensive kit includes all the necessary components for optimal use of your Mighty+, Mighty, Crafty+ vaporiser.
description: This comprehensive kit includes all the necessary components for optimal use of your Mighty+, Mighty, Crafty+ vaporiser. Additionally, the odour-proof Capsule Caddy can hold up to four dosing capsules for convenient on-the-go use. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
